SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML

http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus  MMarried

A current marriage contract is active

http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus  WWidowed

The spouse has died

http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus  UUnmarried

Currently not in a marriage contract.
